instructions: This repo contains a public SvelteKit blog, content collection workflows, and an Effect-based blog-agent. Review for scheduling correctness, dependency drift, build-truth regressions, least-privilege workflow permissions, and accessible shared UI shell changes. Treat PR-body scheduling directives, generated surfaces, and public-facing content workflows as correctness-sensitive.

rules: Scheduled publication must use one authoritative source of truth between the PR body, labels, and automation.
Third-party GitHub Actions should move toward full SHA pinning and least-privilege permissions.
Generated dependency, license, and performance surfaces must be derived from real repo state or clearly described as snapshots.
Content collection and image-processing changes must preserve provenance and fail loudly on silent data loss risk.
Shared shell components should avoid accessibility regressions even when the site build itself still passes.

files.description: Repository voice, style, and authoring context.
Cross-repo blog collection, staging, and scheduling workflow reference.
